8 bit.gadget: Cheat Cartridge. Extra Credits in Heist.
8 bit.starpower: Plugged In in Gem Grab or tough matchups. Boosted Booster elsewhere.

alli.starpower: You Better Run, You Better Take Cover.

angelo.gadget: Master Fletcher most of the time. Stinging Flight is also solid.
angelo.tips: Can hold down autoaim to charge an auto aimed shot.

ash.hypercharge: Rats overwhelm opponents and allow cycling through multiple supers, turning him into a wipe machine.

barley.gadget: Sticky Syrup Mixer on ladder and into tanks/assassins.

bea.gadget: Rattled Hive. Honey Molasses into Gene or snipers sometimes.
bea.tips: Slow projectile speed mean bea is best at midrange rather than max range.

belle.gadget: Nest Egg overall. Reverse Polarity in some Knockout spots.
belle.starpower: Positive Feedback. Grounded can be underrated into Mortis or Kenji.

berry.gadget: Healthy Additives in Heist. Friendship is Great elsewhere.
berry.tips: Attack is impact + damage zone after. Damage zone doesn't stack. Weak vs tanks

bo.gadget: Super Totem overall. Tripwire can be used in Brawl Ball.
bo.hypercharge: Wide-area damage that guarantees kills and shreds Heist safes, with fast cycling via mines.

bonnie.hypercharge: Insanely strong because she can land multiple stuns per hypercharge and kill even the tankiest brawlers.

brock.gadget: Rocket Fuel. Rocket Laces on ladder or into pressure.
brock.tips: User super and then hypercharge for max dmg.

bull.gadget: Stomper. T-Bone Injector in Heist base races or tougher matchups.
bull.starpower: Tough Guy. Berserker can be fun on ladder.

buzz.gadget: Reserve Buoy overall. X-Ray-Shades on bush maps.
buzz.starpower: Eyes Sharp overall. Tougher Torpedo into tankier brawlers.
buzz.hypercharge: Becomes “Spider-Man,” zipping across the map with unlimited stuns to make game-changing plays.

byron.gadget: Booster Shots overall. Shot in the Arm can be decent.
byron.hypercharge: Extends his versatility by giving a bigger AoE super that charges fast and can be used aggressively.
byron.tips: Autoaiming super almost always works perfectly.

carl.gadget: Flying Hook on some Heist maps or for blue star. Heat Ejector elsewhere.
carl.tips: Before supering, throw out one attack.

charlie.gadget: Personal Space as a gem carrier or in some matchups. Spiders into single-shot brawlers.

chuck.gadget: Rerouting in competitive and Heist. Ghost Train on cheesy maps.
chuck.starpower: Tickets Please! overall. Pit Stop on cheesy positioning maps.
chuck.tips: Putting post above safe lets you hit safe twice on the way back.

clancy.tips: Stage one sucks and requires getting out of asap.

colt.gadget: Speedloader. Silver Bullet if you need wall break.

cordelius.gadget: Replanting most of the time. Poison Mushroom into tanks and assassins.

crow.gadget: Defense Booster overall. Slowing Toxin in Brawl Ball to counter Bibi.

darryl.gadget: Recoiling Rotator in Heist. Tar Barrel elsewhere.
darryl.tips: Tip of his super will knockback again.

doug.gadget: Double Sausage in heal cheese comps. Extra Mustard elsewhere.
doug.hypercharge: Enables cheesy combos by hypercharging allies like Janet or Gray for unstoppable setups in Knockout/Bounty.

draco.hypercharge: Hard to charge but nearly guarantees team wipe.
draco.tips: Pairs great with Kit, Byron when supering. Great for when pressure is needed (hot zone, etc.)

dynamike.gadget: Satchel Charge. Fidget Spinner into counters like assassins.

el primo.starpower: Meteor Rush in Brawl Ball. El Fuego elsewhere.
el primo.tips: Super can be chained into suplex for a lot of CC.

emz.gadget: Acid Spray more often. Friendzoner depends on matchup.

fang.gadget: Roundhouse Kick in Knockout/Bounty. Corn-Fu is underrated in Brawl Ball.
fang.starpower: Divine Soles. Fresh Kicks for clip potential.

finx.gadget: Back to the Finxture. No Escape is underrated in Brawl Ball.

frank.gadget: Irresistible Attraction. Active Noise Cancelling is underrated on ladder.
frank.tips: Can wallpeek surprisingly well due to triangular attack.

gale.starpower: Blustery Blow on wall maps or Brawl Ball. Freezing Snow on open maps.

gene.gadget: Lamp Blowout in Gem Grab. Vengeful Spirits elsewhere.
gene.starpower: Spirit Slap if teammates stay near you into Belle. Magic Puffs elsewhere.
gene.gear: Vision or Shield, plus Talk to the Hand.
gene.tips: Move backwards after hitting a pull for longer CC.

gray.starpower: New Perspective in Gem Grab/Hot Zone. Fake Injury in Bounty/Knockout.
gray.tips: Can super backwards after hitting pull gadget to extend pull distance.

griff.starpower: Business Resilience in Hot Zone. Keep the Change is underrated into tanks.
griff.hypercharge: Chaining supers through walls lets him counter tanks and pull off devastating wipes.
griff.tips: Midrange wallbreaker. Use on any map you need a wallbreak + midrange on

gus.gear: Damage and Shield. Health in Bounty.
gus.hypercharge: His hypercharge super melts any assassin/tank that approaches, easy to cycle thanks to accurate shots.
gus.tips: Super niche but can spawn 2 ghosts if you shoot quickly and hit at max range.

hank.gadget: Barricade overall. Water Balloons into tanks.
hank.hypercharge: Cycles hypercharge quickly and loves the speed/damage buffs, suffocating opponents with torpedoes.

jacky.starpower: Counter Crush. Hardy Hard Hat only into full range comps.

jae yong.tips: Really versatile in many team comps.

janet.gadget: Backstage Pass in Gem Grab. Drop the Bass on bush maps.
janet.gear: Vision on bush maps, otherwise Damage and Shield.
janet.hypercharge: One of the best hypercharges in the game, buy it.

jessie.gadget: Spark Plug. Recoil Spring in Heist.

juju.gadget: Elementalist most of the time. Gris-Gris can sometimes get value.
juju.starpower: Guarded Gris-Gris into high DPS. Numbing Needles into tanks or Hank.

kaze.gadget: Hensojutsu for most players. Gracious Host in Brawl or aggressive play.
kaze.hypercharge: In ninja form, dashes through weakened enemies for instant kills and easy super cycles.

kenji.hypercharge: Still really good post nerfs, but no longer guaranteed team wipes.
kenji.tips: Can dash into wall and then use swipe to wall peak for more dmg/range

kit.gadget: Cardboard Box. Cheeseburger in Knockout sometimes.
kit.starpower: Overly Attached in 3v3. Power Hungry in Showdown.
kit.hypercharge: Turns him into an assassin by letting him chain hypercharge supers for back-to-back kills.

lily.starpower: Vigilance most of the time. Spiky into tanks sometimes.
lily.hypercharge: Teleports enemies into the “shadow realm” where they’re helpless, and charges quickly for repeated kills.

lola.gadget: Stunt Double. Freeze Frame is still used by some pros.

lou.gadget: Cryo Syrup for most players. Ice Block is what pros tend to use.
lou.hypercharge: Instantly freezes enemies with no counterplay, then cycles into another super for cleanup.

lumi.tips: Positioning attacks for return is very important.

mandy.gadget: Cookie Crumbs overall. Caramelize for wall shots and super cycling.
mandy.gear: Damage and Shield. Health on Shooting Star.
mandy.hypercharge: Boosts her damage enough to one-shot shielded snipers and meta brawlers, great for clutch team wipes.
mandy.tips: Try moving a little bit after every attack instead of just standing still.

max.starpower: Run N Gun. Super Charged only on very passive Max.
max.hypercharge: Gives her whole team speed plus ¾ of a super, enabling massive tempo swings in fights.

meeple.gadget: Mansions of Meeple on Knockout/Bounty. Rage Quit into assassins and tanks.
meeple.starpower: Do Not Pass Go. Rule Bending for overall value.
meeple.tips: Best matchups are vs midhp brawlers (~6k range). Always preserve ammo to win engagement due to slow reload. Use super offensively on enemy walls.

mico.gadget: Clipping Scream. Presto on a few maps.
mico.starpower: Record Smash in Heist/Showdown. Monkey Business elsewhere.

mina.gadget: Windmill overall. Capo-What? is underrated in Brawl Ball.
mina.tips: good in gem grab, brawl ball

moe.starpower: Skipping Stones most of the time. Speeding Ticket if outranged.

mortis.gadget: Both good depending on matchup. Most pros use creature of the night.
mortis.hypercharge: Can chain bat supers through multiple enemies without getting close, leading massive pushes.

mr p.gadget: Service Bell if you know you will get super. Porter Reinforcements overall.
mr p.hypercharge: Forces enemies to waste shots on hypercharged ports, shutting down single-shot brawlers like Piper or Jean.

nani.gadget: Return to Sender on Bounty and vs snipers. Warp Blast elsewhere.
nani.starpower: Tempered Steel most of the time.
nani.tips: Overshoot behind a little to more reliably hit 2 shots

nita.gadget: Faux Fur. Bear Paws in some matchups.
nita.starpower: Bear With Me. Hyper Bear in Heist.

ollie.gadget: All Eyez on Me most of the time. Regulate can be underrated on maps like Belle's Rock.
ollie.starpower: Renegade most of the time. Kick, Push on a few maps like Hideout.
ollie.hypercharge: Hypercharge lets him wipe teams with huge damage output, though it takes over three supers to charge.
ollie.tips: After hypnotizing, if you have teammate nearby, walk in straight line to make enemy easy to hit. Can auto-aim to shorten super distance.

pam.gadget: Scrapsucker. Pulse Modulator can work on very open maps.

penny.gadget: Salty Barrel. Trusty Spyglass only sometimes.

piper.gadget: Homemade Recipe on long-range modes. Auto Aimer in more aggressive modes.
piper.hypercharge: Adds damage and terrain opening to her jump, enabling aggressive plays and two-taps.

poco.gadget: Tuning Fork overall. Protective Tunes to counter specific status effects like Lou, Crow, or Bea.

r t.gadget: Out of Line almost always. Hacks! only on super open maps.

rico.gadget: Multiball Launcher overall. Bouncy Castle in rough matchups.
rico.starpower: Super Bouncy on wall maps. Robo Retreat in bad matchups.
rico.hypercharge: Unlimited bounce hypercharge cycles supers on the right maps, making him toxic and unstoppable.

rosa.gadget: Grow Light in competitive. Unfriendly Bushes is also usable.

ruffs.gadget: Air Support most of the time. Take Cover into single-shot brawlers.
ruffs.starpower: Air Superiority. Field Promotion in Knockout.

sandy.tips: Try to use super in a way that enables you to charge your super back. (Generally avoid using unless you have full hp and can push up with team).

shade.tips:
Heavily enabled by walls. Great in brawl ball, gem grab, and hot zone.
Matchup list according to spen: https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/931255199627112458/1314104641247514624/The_Only_Shade_Guide_Youll_Ever_Need_4-11_screenshot.png?ex=67528ed1&is=67513d51&hm=50f1dee469c3079dcde589f9abda83b33c46a33bfd4f2dceffb288ba4fa597f4&

spike.gadget: Life Plant most of the time. Popping Pincushion into assassins, tanks, or Heist.

squeak.gadget: Windup on Knockout/Bounty. Residue can still be underrated on some maps.
squeak.starpower: Chain Reaction into squishies. Super Sticky most of the time.

stu.gadget: Breakthrough. Speed Zone only in super passive modes.

surge.gadget: Power Surge in competitive. Power Shield on ladder.

tara.gadget: Support From Beyond almost always. Psychic Enhancer vs Penny or Sandy.
tara.hypercharge: Charges in only two supers, nearly unmissable, breaks terrain, and makes her dominant in Gem Grab.

trunk.hypercharge: Should be strong once bug is fixed, letting him instantly delete enemies when dashing through.

willow.starpower: Obsession in Brawl Ball. Love Is Blind elsewhere.

ziggy.gadget: Electric Shuffle. Now You See Me can be okay defensively.
ziggy.tips: His super is why he is good, so don't waste it and try to save ammo so you can cycle supers.

pierce.gadget: Bottomless Mags overall. Bubble Trouble into aggro.

glowbert.gadget: More Lumens is easier value. Spectral Surge is great if you are grouping and healing teammates.
glowbert.tips: Best in any control map, especially on more open maps. Reconnect beam to burst an extra 300 dmg. Glowbert is all about good positioning.

sirius.gadget: A Star Is Born overall. Stellar Collapse can be toxic in the right matchup.
sirius.tips: Try to keep your shadows alive and sync pushes with team. Will dominate control modes

najia.gadget: poison puddles generically. Jar vs assassins
